interface.longDescription:
With Gamma, you can turn your ideas into polished, professional content directly inside ChatGPT. Whether you're drafting a pitch deck, marketing brief, or team update, Gamma helps you create beautiful, on-brand presentations, documents, social posts, and webpages, without leaving your workflow.

You can ask Gamma to:

- "Turn this technical report into an executive summary."
- "Build a marketing brief for our cybersecurity offering. Adapt it to a non-technical audience."
- "Create a 4-slide pitch deck about a team offsite to Hawaii, add in some jokes."
- "Design a project proposal document with a dark theme." (Themes determine look and feel.)
defaultPrompt: Make gamma pitch deck about our new hotels, using Lavender
